Create a typed KV tier over a Node filesystem backend (D106 passive storage).

## Import

```ts
import { fileKv } from "@graphrefly/ts/storage/node";
```

## Signature

```ts
function fileKv(
	dir: string,
	opts: FileKvOptions<T> = {},
): KvStorageTier<T>
```
